title: incomplete detection of number literal truncation with -gstrict-expr-width

features.name: unsized decimal literal truncation with strict-expr-width
features.description: Code should include an unsized decimal literal (4294967294) used in a localparam where -gstrict-expr-width should detect truncation from 33 bits to 32 bits

features.name: unsized binary literal with Z MSB truncation
features.description: Code should include an unsized binary literal with Z in the most significant bit position where -gstrict-expr-width fails to detect truncation

features.name: truncate_to_integer_width uses wrong bit for padding check
features.description: Code should include number literals where truncation detection incorrectly uses MSB instead of 31st bit position for determining allowed zero-padding
